query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameStatus, awayGoalie, awayGoalieConfirmed, homeGoalie, homeGoalieConfirmed, modelRunAt, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelAwayPuckLine, modelHomePuckLine, modelAwayPLOdds, modelHomePLOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-15' AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY sortOrder;
